name: Arn Media Limited
analysis: A1N has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 54% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.2650, stop A$0.2079, target A$0.3100 (0.79:1) — then trail it.
